Notice Of Motion For An Order Permitting The Filing Of An Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALEXSANDER AYALA-IGLESIAS' Motion For An Order Permitting The Filing Of An Amended Complaint.

GRANT. The parties stipulated to the relief. The Court will sign the proposed order but interlineate that plaintiff shall immediately file and serve the amended complaint. The court does not deem pleadings filed and served.
